SessionStart.additional_context: Prefer structured tools over bash when possible. Use todo for multi-step work, keep one item in_progress, and keep edits tightly scoped.

permission_decision.reason: Shell commands have broader blast radius than structured file tools in YULOO

PostToolUse.additional_context: Use concrete file evidence from what you just read before deciding to edit, delegate, or answer.
Integrate the delegated result into the parent plan or answer on the next turn; do not leave subagent output hanging.
Keep the todo list synchronized with actual progress and maintain at most one in_progress item.
Apply the loaded skill immediately and do not carry it forward implicitly after the current task unless it is re-invoked.
